common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: user_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a user.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by(depends on different APIs) partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token,  user_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm.

define: Get the item list of the Recently tab. (For TW, ID, TH, PH, MY, SG, VN)

request_params.description: Specifies the starting entry of data to return in the current call. Default is 0, if data is more than one page, the offset can be some entry to start next call.
request_params.name: offset

request_params.description: Each result set is returned as a page of entries. Use the "page_size" filters to control the maximum number of entries to retrieve per page (i.e., per call). This integer value is used to specify the maximum number of entries to return in a single "page" of data. The limit of page_size if between 1 and 100.
request_params.name: page_size

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
response_params.name: request_id

children.description: This is to indicate whether the list is more than one page. If this value is true, you may want to continue to check next page to retrieve the rest of data.
children.name: more

children.description: If more is true, this value need set to next request offset.
children.name: next_offset

children.description: Name of the item in local language.
children.name: name

children.description: The three-digit code representing the currency unit used for the item.
children.name: currency

children.description: The current price of the item in the listing currency. If product under an ongoing promotion, current_price will be the promotion price.
children.name: current_price

children.description: The original price of the item in the listing currency.
children.name: original_price

children.description: The commission rate that the streamer can get, for example, 0.1 means 10%.
children.name: commission_rate

children.description: Whether participate in a campaign project (generally, the commission will be higher)
children.name: is_campaign

children.description: Campaign start time, it's unix timestamp in seconds.
children.name: campaign_start_time

children.description: Campaign end time, it's unix timestamp in seconds.
children.name: campaign_end_time

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/livestream/get_recent_item_list?access_token=access_token&offset=0&page_size=10&partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp&user_id=user_id',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

value.message: Invalid page_size, page_size must larger than 0 and cannot exceed 100
